action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 29 successfully evaluated checkpoints/final_ensemble.pt and achieved a new best balanced_accuracy of 0.8596 (previous best was 0.8544). The ensemble combines ft.pt (weight 0.45) and crt_v2.pt (weight 0.55) with logit-adjustment temperature tau=0.85, validated with flip-TTA. Analysis: This score came from an exhaustive search over all model pairs, triples, and selected 4-ways using precomputed validation logits, so further zero-cost ensembles are unlikely to yield gains. With only 1 iteration remaining and ~50 minutes left, any new training run or heavy tuning risks timing out or producing an inferior result. The predict.py pipeline is already validated and the checkpoint is saved. Decision: End the experiment now to preserve the best score.
action.done_reason: Achieved best balanced_accuracy of 0.8596 with final ensemble (ft=0.45, crt_v2=0.55, tau=0.85). Exhaustive ensemble search completed and no safe improvements remain within the final iteration budget.
